name: Eightfold Talent Intelligence API
what_it_does: Eightfold AI REST API for talent intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to access AI-powered candidate matching, skills inference, talent pool management, job-candidate fit scoring, internal mobility recommendations, and workforce insights. Eightfold uses deep learning to build a universal skills graph and match talent to opportunities across the full talent lifecycle.
use_cases: Matching candidates to open roles from AI-powered recruiting agents
Accessing skill inference data from workforce analytics agents
Managing talent pools and pipelines from talent acquisition agents
Identifying internal mobility opportunities from succession planning agents
not_for: Simple ATS without AI-powered matching requirements
SMB recruiting without talent intelligence investment
Manual resume review workflows without AI augmentation
best_when: An enterprise TA or HR team using Eightfold wants AI agents to access talent intelligence scores, skill data, and candidate matching capabilities to automate talent pipeline management.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: AI-driven hiring decisions require transparency and bias monitoring. Candidate data and hiring scores are highly sensitive. GDPR, CCPA, and EEOC compliance critical for AI hiring tools.

auth.notes: Eightfold uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Enterprise customer credentials via Eightfold implementation team. No self-service API access — requires enterprise engagement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise talent intelligence pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts based on employee count and modules
pricing.notes: India-founded, US-headquartered. Enterprise-only AI talent platform. Used by large enterprises for talent transformation programs.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits per client

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: AI hiring scores and candidate matching data — EEOC, GDPR, CCPA compliance critical
AI bias risk: automated scoring for hiring decisions requires regular bias auditing
No public MCP server — enterprise-only REST API requiring implementation team engagement
Very limited public documentation — enterprise customer relationship required
AI model explanations required for EU AI Act compliance (high-risk AI system)
India-founded company with US HQ — global data residency available
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: AI hiring scores and candidate data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EEOC compliance for AI hiring. EU AI Act high-risk classification. Enterprise-only with minimal public docs.

security_score_components.security_notes: AI hiring scores and candidate PII. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EEOC + EU AI Act compliance for AI hiring. Enterprise-only.
